description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of two jobs: test-nixos and build. The test-nixos job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the repository, installs Nix, and runs tests in a nix-shell. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with multiple Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs pytest with and without mypy and pylint, and performs additional checks using codespell, pyupgrade, and safety.
